markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover of automated enrichment and event attribution systems.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Enrichment System:** A new, always-on Clay enrichment workflow now populates HubSpot with company data (revenue, funding, industry) and contact data (location, GTM role, seniority tier), enabling precise segmentation.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Event Attribution:** A new workflow tracks event influence on AI-led Growth (AIG) membership. It credits an event if a contact becomes an AIG member within 30 days of attending.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**HubSpot Segmentation:** A new framework uses canonical segments (e.g., `Contact | Seniority Tier | Executive`) as building blocks to create complex, dynamic target lists.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4602.0)
  - [**Email Marketing:** HubSpot marketing emails are now active. For cold lists, warm the domain by sending in batches (e.g., 100 → 200 → 300) to protect sender reputation.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4088.0)

## Topics

### Always-On Enrichment Workflow (Clay)

  - [The new workflow uses progressive enrichment to save credits by filtering out unqualified companies early.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [**Company Enrichment (`company-based enrichment`):**](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
    1.  [**Foundational Data:** Pulls all companies from HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
    2.  [**Domain Validation:** Checks domain validity (e.g., not a parked page).](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
    3.  [**Initial Enrichment:** Fills in missing company data (LinkedIn, website).](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
    4.  [**Qualification:** Filters companies based on a simplified fit score (Revenue \> $1M OR Funding \> $2M) to capture high-potential startups.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
    5.  **Deep Enrichment:**
          - [**Revenue:** Uses a waterfall (HG Insights → Clearbit → SmartE) to get a revenue *range*. This avoids a Clay quirk where requesting an *exact* estimate runs all providers and burns credits.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
          - [**Industry:** An AI agent classifies companies into standardized sectors using a reference guide.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [**Contact Enrichment (`base enrichment for people`):**](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2238.0)
      - [Pulls contacts from "good fit" companies (\~18k contacts).](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
      - [**Data Points Pushed to HubSpot:**](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
          - [`Location` (e.g., "San Francisco Bay Area")](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
          - [`Is GTM Role` (True/False)](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
          - [`Employment Seniority Tier` (Leader, Executive, Manager/IC)](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
      - [**Credit Management:** The workflow is paused at 1k contacts to conserve credits before the monthly reset. The plan is to enrich the full list incrementally.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2260.0)

### HubSpot Segmentation Framework

  - [The framework uses canonical segments as building blocks to create complex, dynamic lists.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4602.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4957.0)
    1.  [**Create Canonical Segments:** Build base lists for key dimensions (e.g., `Contact | Seniority Tier | Executive`).](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4778.0)
    2.  [**Compose New Segments:** Combine canonical segments using `AND` logic to create precise target lists (e.g., `Executive AND Bay Area`).](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4957.0)
  - [**Benefit:** This method is more efficient and less error-prone than building complex filters from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4620.0)

### Event & Membership Attribution

  - [**Goal:** Track event influence on AI-led Growth (AIG) membership.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**Logic:** Credit an event if a contact becomes an AIG member within 30 days of attending.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [**Implementation:** A new workflow will compare the AIG membership date against event attendance dates.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [**Reference:** The existing deal attribution workflow in the `EventHapply` folder serves as a template.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Email Marketing & Tracking

  - [**Sending from HubSpot:** The domain is warmed by lead magnet sends, but for cold lists, use a batch schedule (e.g., 100 → 200 → 300) to protect sender reputation.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4088.0)
  - [**UTM Tracking:** HubSpot's campaign tracking tool is for *generating* UTM links, not for analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=5972.0)
      - [**Action:** Add a `utm_content` tag to each link to identify the specific resource.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=5795.0)
      - [**Analysis:** View UTM data in PostHog, the recommended analytics tool.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=5876.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Upload historical Luma event data (registrants, attendees) to HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [Send the `Industry Classification Reference Guide` PDF to Jesus and Gloria.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [**Jesus:**](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2726.0)
      - [Incrementally enrich the remaining \~17k contacts in Clay after the credit reset.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=2726.0)
      - [Confirm HubSpot syncs are active for Circle and Beehive.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=3618.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4338.0)
      - [Request Ed to build the AIG membership attribution workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [Create canonical HubSpot segments for the new `Employment Seniority Tier` property.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4746.0)
      - [Plan email sends for cold lists using the batch-warming schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4088.0)
  - [**Jesus & Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=3688.0)
      - [Use the new HubSpot segmentation framework to build target lists.](https://fathom.video/share/h1hYZzxZfqjxKsNNB7VR-CMM5AWmkW4k?tab=summary&timestamp=4828.0)
